hero.headline:
Your brand at every event.
Set up in 5 minutes.
hero.subline: 1 person. 1 backpack. Trusted by 1,500+ global brands.
roi.headline: Every event without an Airdome costs you more.
roi.subtext: Stop wasting €800–€2,400 on generic tent rentals every single event. With an Airdome, your brand owns the space permanently.

design.s1.title: Design a tent for your unique brand
design.s1.subtitle: Our AI will analyze your brand identity to suggest the perfect architecture, vibe, and personality for your dome.
design.s1.placeholder: Type your company name or URL...
design.s1.notfound: We couldn't automatically find your brand data. Please select an option:

design.s2.title: Define your brand's personality.
design.s2.subtitle: This helps us determine the shape and structure of your dome.
design.s3.title: What's the vibe inside?
design.s3.subtitle: The internal atmosphere dictates the lighting and material selection.
design.s3.quote: The Zen atmosphere completely changed how our guests interacted with the brand.

design.s4.title: Which size fits your event?
design.s4.subtitle: Not sure? Our team will advise during the design review.
design.s4.roi.label: Investment Case — 4×4m (Popular)
design.s4.roi.note: One new client per event and it pays for itself in full.
design.s4.note: All sizes can be linked to create larger covered spaces.
design.s5.title: How many walls does your dome need?
design.s5.subtitle: Each wall adds enclosure and additional branding surface.
design.s5.w0.hint: Fully open — maximum airflow and visibility
design.s5.w3.hint: Three sides — sheltered with one open front
design.s5.extension.title: Add Canopy Extension
design.s5.extension.hint: Extend your dome with a canopy awning for extra covered space.
design.s6.title: Where will your tent be seen?
design.s6.subtitle: This determines the render environment we create for you.
design.s7.title: When do you need your dome?
design.s7.subtitle: This helps us plan production and delivery for your event.
design.s7.asap.hint: Rush production available — contact us to confirm feasibility.
design.s7.month.hint: Standard lead time. We can typically deliver with full branding.
design.s7.quarter.hint: Comfortable timeline. Full design & production process included.
design.s7.planning.hint: Planning ahead gives you maximum options and early-bird pricing.
